items.name: Claude Cowork
items.hook: Anthropic's Jan 12 research preview — Claude Code for knowledge workers. Direct permission-based access to local files from the macOS app.
items.install: # macOS desktop app — enable from claude.ai settings
items.evidence: Launched Jan 12 to Max, widened to Pro by Jan 16. Mostly built by Claude Code.

items.name: everything-claude-code
items.hook: Full agent harness with 48 agents, 183 skills, hooks, rules and MCP configs. Hit ~162k stars three months after a Jan 18 creation.

items.name: awesome-openclaw-skills
items.hook: VoltAgent's curated registry — 5,400+ OpenClaw skills filtered from 13,729 candidates. Jan 25 launch pulled ~47k stars.

items.name: antigravity-awesome-skills
items.hook: Installable library of 1,400+ agentic skills covering Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI and Antigravity. ~34k stars from Jan 14.

items.name: rtk
items.hook: Rust CLI proxy that strips noise from dev-command output before it hits the model — claims 60-90% token reduction. ~30k stars from Jan 22.

items.name: oh-my-claudecode
items.hook: Teams-first multi-agent orchestration layer for Claude Code. ~30k stars since its Jan 9 release.

items.name: nanoclaw
items.hook: Container-native alternative to OpenClaw — messaging integrations, memory, scheduled jobs, runs on Anthropic's Agents SDK. Exploded to ~28k stars from Jan 31.
items.install: gh repo fork qwibitai/nanoclaw --clone && cd nanoclaw && claude

items.name: last30days-skill
items.hook: Research skill that pulls 30-day signal from Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket and the web into a grounded summary. ~23k stars from Jan 23.

items.name: claude-hud
items.hook: Statusline plugin showing context usage, active tools, running agents and todo progress. ~20k stars since Jan 2.

items.name: planning-with-files
items.hook: Skill that implements Manus-style persistent markdown planning — the workflow pattern behind the $2B acquisition. ~19k stars from Jan 3.

items.name: baoyu-skills
items.hook: Jim Liu's content + image-gen skill bundle — infographics, slides, social publishing, nine image providers. ~15k stars from Jan 13.

items.name: cmux
items.hook: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications purpose-built for AI coding agents. ~15k stars since Jan 28.
items.install: brew tap manaflow-ai/cmux && brew install --cask cmux

items.name: hive
items.hook: Zero-setup harness that auto-generates multi-agent topologies for long-running workflows. ~10k stars since Jan 12.

items.name: trailofbits/skills
items.hook: Trail of Bits ships 40+ security skills — smart-contract scanners, YARA authoring, Android APK checks, differential code audits. ~4.7k stars.

items.name: antfu/skills
items.hook: Anthony Fu's curated skills — Vue, Nuxt, Vite, Vitest, Pinia, UnoCSS, pnpm — hand-tuned plus generated from upstream docs. ~4.6k stars.

items.name: open-claude-cowork
items.hook: Composio's open-source take on Claude Cowork with 500+ SaaS integrations. Shipped Jan 13, day after Anthropic's preview.

items.name: claude-code-ultimate-guide
items.hook: 24k lines of docs, 228 templates, 271 quiz questions and a built-in MCP server you can point Claude Code at. ~3.7k stars from Jan 9.

items.name: claude-scholar
items.hook: Research assistant covering ideation → literature → experiments → writing, with Zotero and Obsidian integrations. ~3.4k stars.
items.evidence: Created Jan 2026; 3,448 stars per GitHub search.

items.name: ralphy
items.hook: Autonomous bash loop that runs Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Qwen and Droid against a PRD until it's done. ~2.8k stars.

items.name: claude-octopus
items.hook: Puts up to 8 models on every coding task so blind spots surface before you ship. Plugin form, ~2.8k stars from Jan 15.

items.name: 9router
items.hook: Free router connecting Claude Code, Cursor and Cline to 40+ providers and 100+ models, auto-switching tiers when quotas die. ~2.7k stars.
items.evidence: Created Jan 2026; 2,729 stars per GitHub search.

items.name: ouroboros
items.hook: Spec-driven harness — interview, seed, execute, evaluate, evolve — with nine specialized agents and 3-stage evaluation gates. ~2.4k stars.

items.name: agent-of-empires
items.hook: Rust TUI + web dashboard for managing many Claude Code / OpenCode / Codex sessions via tmux and git worktrees. ~1.6k stars.

items.name: drift
items.hook: MCP server that learns codebase patterns and remembers decisions across sessions. Offline CLI, works in any IDE. ~780 stars from Jan 19.
items.install: # MCP — see repo README for server config

items.name: mcp-security-hub
items.hook: FuzzingLabs' collection of MCP servers wiring offensive tools — Nmap, Ghidra, Nuclei, SQLMap, Hashcat — into AI assistants. ~525 stars.
